1733,4222,2947,4207,2948,4302,1734,4317,1. ALL SALES ARE FINAL. GOODS SOLD
1837,4312,3107,4302,3108,4385,1838,4394,ARE NOT REFUNDABLE NOR EXCHANGEABLE.
1732,4398,2875,4387,2875,4471,1732,4482,2. OUR PRODUCTS CONTAIN NO ADDED
1837,4483,3116,4471,3117,4553,1838,4566,PRESERVATIVES, PLEASE CONSUME WITHIN
1839,4568,2767,4558,2768,4643,1840,4652,A DAY OR KEEP ACCORDING TO
1843,4650,2862,4643,2863,4727,1843,4734,RECOMMENDATIONS ON PACKAGING.
1728,4734,2973,4725,2974,4809,1729,4818,3. FOR FEEDBACK, PLEASE RETAIN THIS
1841,4815,2939,4815,2939,4902,1841,4902,TAX INVOICE. SEEK STORE MANAGER
1837,4904,2933,4897,2933,4981,1838,4989,ASSISTANCE OR DROP US AN EMAIL.
1732,4990,2908,4981,2909,5065,1732,5075,4. TAX INVOICE CAN ONLY BE ISSUED
1837,5076,3044,5065,3044,5148,1838,5159,ON THE PURCHASE DATE, AMENDMENT IS
1835,5159,2686,5151,2687,5235,1836,5243,NOT ALLOWED ONCE ISSUED.
